roa.docketEntryComment: NOTICE OF APPEAL;STATEMENT OF APPEAL FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL;STATEMENT ON APPEAL FILED
DA SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM RE SF FIRE DEPT MEDIC 75 FILED
PD MOT TO SUPP EVID FILED TODAY IN ROOM 101
/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO THE RECORD/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/X:PEOPLE UNABLE TO PROCEED,/TEXT:COURT ORDERS CAUSE DISM PURS PC 1385/MO PC 1385C/
/X:GOOD CAUSE HAVING BEEN SHOWN:/X:THE STATEMENT ON APPEAL IS SETTLED,/X:IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE APPEAL RECORD BE CERTIFIED TO THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT,/

/CAL:HEARING TO SETTLE STATEMENT ON APPEAL SET BEFORE JUDGE MILLER IN CCC DEPT, 318/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL IS NOT PRESENT/X:MS, OGDEN STATES THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS READY TO SETTLE THE TRANSCRIPT ON APPEAL,/X:THE CLERK WILL NOTIFY DEFENSE COUNSEL OF THE CONTINUANCE,/X:IF DEFENSE COUNSEL IS NOT PRESENT AT THE NEXT HEARING, THE COURT WILL SETTLE THE STATEMENT ON APPEAL,//CONTD:HEARING TO SETTLE STATEMENT ON APPEAL/DAWF/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/ORPJ/DOP/GTWM/987,2/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT INTO PROJECT O,R, THREE TIMES A WEEK/CONTD:PRETRIAL/
/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENSE COUNSEL,/CONT/
